# Metroviz Vendor

Source: https://github.com/rstockm/Metroviz
Vendored: 2026-06-03
Commit: master branch

Files included (trimmed to Phase 2 v1 must-haves per D-01/D-02):
- js/metro-renderer.js — MetroRenderer class
- js/layout-engine.js — LayoutEngine class
- js/data-model.js — DataModel class
- js/utils.js — parseDate() and utilities
- js/color-utils.js — color palette helpers
- css/metroviz.css — SVG styling required by MetroRenderer

Files NOT included (skipped per D-02):
- js/app.js — Alpine.js application shell
- js/dialog.js, editor-actions.js, file-manager.js, markdown-export.js, url-state.js — UI features not needed
